title: feat: add p0 admin support event operator notes
goal: Add local/internal admin operator notes for support events without mutating support core fields or triggering side effects.
doneCriteria: admin operator notes requires admin bearer token
admin operator notes rejects invalid auth
admin operator notes creates safe note
admin operator notes enforces max length
admin operator notes sanitizes unsafe text
admin operator notes writes safe audit metadata
admin operator notes does not mutate support core fields
admin operator notes does not enqueue reaction or overlay
securityBoundaries: No DB driver, Redis, or Kafka dependency is added.
No real DB connection is introduced.
No migration is changed or executed.
No real YouTube API or OAuth token is used.
No real TTS, Live2D, renderer, OBS, or WebSocket delivery is performed.
No support financial, source, wallet, moderation, or affinity fields are mutated.
No reaction or overlay side effects are enqueued.
No RPC, wallet, deploy, contracts, workflows, web, or overlay app changes.
Raw payloads, secrets, URLs, stack output, stdout, stderr, jobs_url, and logs_url are not returned.
No runtime, production, legal, or YouTube policy readiness is claimed.
residualRisks: This is local/internal admin operator note metadata only.
Durable operator notes persistence remains future scoped work because migrations and real DB changes are forbidden.
humanConfirmation: AI review is not human approval.
AI review is not GitHub approval review.
This PR does not create owner approval record.
This PR does not create merge authority.

packageVerification.verification: No package scripts, runtime dependencies, DB driver dependency, Redis/Kafka dependency, package.json, or pnpm-lock changes are introduced.

apiCompatibilitySummary.statement: Adds local/internal admin support event operator notes metadata.

runtimeSmokeRationale: No runtime readiness is claimed; this is local/internal admin operator notes metadata only.
rollbackOrStopCondition: Stop if package.json, pnpm-lock, contracts, migrations, workflows, scripts, apps/web, apps/overlay, real YouTube API, real OAuth, real RPC, real DB, DB driver dependency, Redis/Kafka dependency, wallet/RPC/deploy changes, real TTS/Live2D/renderer/OBS/WebSocket delivery, unsupported mutation, public note exposure, or readiness/compliance claims are introduced.

reviewScope.scope: P0 admin support event operator notes, admin auth, sanitization, safe audit metadata, support core read-only behavior, tests, docs, and .codex evidence.
reviewScope.riskSummary: Main risk is exposing unsafe notes, mutating support core state, enqueueing side effects, or implying runtime readiness; tests and docs reject those outcomes.
reviewScope.verificationOracle: Operator notes tests, existing admin support event tests, full repository tests, evidence checks, quality self-protection, secret scan, and GitHub same-head checks.
